check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('SearchSuggestEnabled')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox search suggestions must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; permissions=policies.get('Permissions') or {}; autoplay=permissions.get('Autoplay') or {}; print(str(autoplay.get('Default')).lower())"

python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('NetworkPrediction')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox network prediction must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('EnableTrackingProtection') or {}; print(str(parent.get('Fingerprinting')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox fingerprinting protection must be enabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('EnableTrackingProtection') or {}; print(str(parent.get('Cryptomining')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox cryptomining protection must be enabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; prefs=policies.get('Preferences') or {}; entry=prefs.get('browser.contentblocking.category') or {}; print('configured' if str(entry.get('Value')).lower()=='strict' and str(entry.get('Status')).lower()=='locked' else '')"

checks.description: Firefox Enhanced Tracking Protection must be enabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; prefs=policies.get('Preferences') or {}; entry=prefs.get('extensions.htmlaboutaddons.recommendations.enabled') or {}; print('configured' if str(entry.get('Value')).lower()=='false' and str(entry.get('Status')).lower()=='locked' else '')"

checks.description: Firefox extension recommendations must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('DisabledCiphers') or {}; print(str(parent.get('TLS_RSA_WITH_3DES_EDE_CBC_SHA')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox deprecated ciphers must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('UserMessaging') or {}; print(str(parent.get('ExtensionRecommendations')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox must not recommend extensions as the user is using the browser.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('FirefoxHome') or {}; checks=[('Search', 'false'), ('TopSites', 'false'), ('SponsoredTopSites', 'false'), ('Pocket', 'false'), ('SponsoredPocket', 'false'), ('Highlights', 'false'), ('Snippets', 'false'), ('Locked', 'true')]; print('configured' if all(str(parent.get(k)).lower()==v for k,v in checks) else '')"

checks.description: The Firefox New Tab page must not show Top Sites, Sponsored Top Sites, Pocket Recommendations, Sponsored Pocket Stories, Searches, Highlights, or Snippets.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('DNSOverHTTPS') or {}; print(str(parent.get('Enabled')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox must be configured so that DNS over HTTPS is disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('DisableFirefoxAccounts')).lower())"

python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('DisableFeedbackCommands')).lower())"

checks.description: Firefox feedback reporting must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('EncryptedMediaExtensions') or {}; checks=[('Enabled', 'false'), ('Locked', 'true')]; print('configured' if all(str(parent.get(k)).lower()==v for k,v in checks) else '')"

checks.description: Firefox encrypted media extensions must be disabled.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; parent=policies.get('SanitizeOnShutdown') or {}; checks=[('Cache', 'false'), ('Cookies', 'false'), ('Downloads', 'false'), ('FormData', 'false'), ('History', 'false'), ('Sessions', 'false'), ('SiteSettings', 'false'), ('OfflineApps', 'false'), ('Locked', 'true')]; print('configured' if all(str(parent.get(k)).lower()==v for k,v in checks) else '')"

checks.description: Firefox must be configured to not delete data upon shutdown.

check.command: python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('DisablePocket')).lower())"

python3 -c "import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/usr/lib/firefox/distribution/policies.json'); policies=json.loads(p.read_text()).get('policies', {}) if p.exists() else {}; print(str(policies.get('DisableFirefoxStudies')).lower())"
